summary: Plan-mode repair of the structured result only. The deterministic validator classified every listed target as security-sensitive and requires route_security for each target, so the prior non-mutating keep_independent actions are narrowly replaced with non-mutating route_security actions. No GitHub mutation, close, label, comment, merge, or fix action is planned.
